title: Melted Mustard Peruvian Potato Casserole
description: A flexitarian-friendly Peruvian dish featuring roasted potatoes, melted cheese, and a hint of mustard, served in an agave leaf vessel. This recipe is perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika until they are evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix the mustard and cheese until well combined.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and top them with the mustard-cheese mixture.
Return the potatoes to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
While the potatoes are baking, prepare the agave leaves by rinsing them with water and patting them dry with paper towels.
To serve, place a portion of the potato casserole in the center of each agave leaf and fold the leaves to form a vessel.
